Perched in the prestigious Burlingame Hills, this breathtaking estate at 158 Los Robles Drive offers an exceptional luxury leasing opportunity at $14,500 per month. This expansive five-bedroom, four-bathroom residence blends architectural elegance with modern sophistication, creating a truly elevated living experience.

Inside, a stunning atrium-style living space welcomes you with soaring ceilings, exposed wood beams, dramatic skylights, and exquisite handcrafted copper lighting. The heart of the home is a designer chef's kitchen, outfitted with custom cabinetry and premium finishes, ideal for both everyday living and refined entertaining. A striking brick fireplace anchors the main living area, adding warmth and character.

The primary suite serves as a private retreat, featuring a spa-inspired bathroom adorned with rare Michael Angelo Calcutta marble and a sculptural freestanding soaking tub. Throughout the home, high-end fiberglass dual-pane windows and doors provide both energy efficiency and quiet comfort.

Modern conveniences abound, including an attached two-car garage, a Tesla EV charging station, and a whole-home backup generator ensuring seamless living at all times. Outdoors, a beautifully designed low-maintenance backyard and patio create a serene setting for relaxation or entertaining.

Ideally located, the property offers immediate access to scenic hiking trails, as well as convenient connectivity via Interstate 280 for effortless commuting to San Francisco International Airport and the vibrant shops and dining of downtown Burlingame. Situated within the highly regarded Burlingame School District, this home provides access to top-tier local schools.

This is a rare opportunity to lease a truly exceptional home in one of Burlingame's most coveted neighborhoods.

Located on a tree lined street, 1517 Balboa Ave is a well maintained single family home offering approximately 1,798 square feet of interior space, with 3 bedrooms and 3 bathrooms. Two houses down from Ray Park and steps away from Lincoln Elementary.

This split level house has a large open living/family room with a fireplace. Dinning room opens up to the kitchen which connects to a breakfast nook and bathroom. Kitchen is equipped with stainless steel refrigerator, dishwasher, and gas range/oven, and a low profile microwave drawer. The large island provides additional cabinetry and counter space. 

Upstairs consist of three bedrooms and two bathrooms filled with natural lights and multiple windows in every room. One ensuite with a tub and a large bathroom with dual sinks. Front loading washer and gas dryer are located in the garage.

A/C and heating in the house provides 5 zones capable of producing different temperatures in various parts of the house.

EV capable garage can easily fit two vehicles tandem. The long driveway can accommodate an additional large vehicle or two compact cars. 

Large front yard with endless possibilities. Low maintenance backyard is suitable for outdoor seating or gardening. Large unfinished basement was a workshop and can be used for storage or turned into hobby room. ADU in the back of the property is not included and has its own separate entrance, separate PG&E meter, separate garbage. 

Renters will be responsible for utilities including, water, PG&E, garbage and yard maintenance.

Open to discussing $9000/mo for a 2 year lease.
